title: HrdaTools
description: Useful Commands for Servers and Scripted SMPs
body:
# **HrdaTools**
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ca8df747453da2b2a04a28155fd72c48d2b7852.png)

**HrdaTools** is a versatile utility plugin designed for SMP servers and content creators who need advanced control over their world, items, and player interactions. Originally inspired by the "Unstable SMP" style of gameplay, it offers a unique mix of administration tools and immersive features.

## Need Hosting? Use PROMO CODE!
![neyhost promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c69bf42453db60ec47c6505de21e7e647f4b68a5_0.webp)(https://www.neyhost.com/?ref=HRDA)

---

## ✨ Key Features

### 👤 Player Management & Stealth
* **`/vanish`** – Become completely invisible. This hides you from the world, removes you from the TAB list, blocks your name from Tab-Complete, and sends a fake "left the game" message to others.
* **`/hearts <player> <amount>`** – Set a player's maximum health (e.g., `/hearts Hrda 10` for 10 hearts).
* **`/invincible [player]`** – Toggle a special "Fake Immortality" mode. Players stay at 0.5 hearts and cannot die from standard damage.
* **`/invsee <player> [armor]`** – Peek into any player's inventory. Use the `armor` argument to open a protected preview of their equipment and off-hand.
* **`/ec [player]`** – Access your own or someone else's Ender Chest.
* **`/freeze <player> [time]`** – Freezes or Unfreezes specific player.

### 📦 Kit System
* **`/kit save <name>`** – Save your current inventory (including armor and off-hand) as a kit.
* **`/kit gui`** - Opens GUI with all kits and their previews
* **`/kit <name> <player|all>`** – Give a saved kit to a specific player or everyone online.
* **`/kit delete <name>`** – Remove a kit from the database.

### ⚔️ Item & Enchantment Overdrive
* **`/enchant <target> <enchantment> <level>`** – Apply any enchantment up to **level 255**. Bypass all standard limits! Supports selectors (`@a`, `@p`, `@s`, `@r`).
* **`/durability <value>`** – Precisely set the durability of the item in your hand.
* **`/book <sign|unsign|author|title>`** – Advanced book editing. Change authors, revert signed books to editable drafts, or change titles with color support.

### 🔊 Immersive Proximity System
* **Proximity Messages** – Join, quit, and death messages are only shown to players within a certain range (configurable).
* **Death Effects** – Adds a visual lightning bolt (no damage) and optional Wither spawn sound at the player's death location.
* **`/proximity`** – Quickly toggle the proximity system on or off.

### 🛡️ Server Administration
* **`/mutechat`** – Instantly lock the chat for everyone except players with bypass permissions.
* **`/toggletab`** – Instantly shows/hides player names in the TAB list for ultimate anonymity.
* **`/clearall [survival|creative|adventure|offline|permission]`** – Clears inventory (including armor and off-hand) for specified players or based on their gamemode/permissions. Use `offline` to wipe all player data files.
* **`/kickall [survival|creative|adventure|permission] [reason]`** – Kicks all specified players from the server with an optional custom reason.
* **`/banall [survival|creative|adventure|permission] [reason]`** – Permanently bans all specified players and kicks them from the server.
* **`/hrdatools reload`** – Reload the configuration file without restarting the server.

---

## ⚙️ Configuration
The plugin comes with a `config.yml` that allows you to customize:
* **Proximity distance** (default: 50 blocks).
* **Toggle** for proximity chat features.
* **Toggle** for death sound effects and lightning summons.
* **Kit storage** and management in `kits.db`

---

## 🔑 Permissions
* `hrdatools.admin` – Access to all commands (default: OP).
* `hrdatools.mutechat.bypass` – Ability to speak when chat is muted.
* `hrdatools.kickall.bypass` - Bypass for `/kickall permission`
* `hrdatools.banall.bypass` - Bypass for `/banall permission`
* `hrdatools.clearall.bypass` - Bypass for `/clearall permission`

---

## Placeholders
For working placeholders you need to have [PAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/placeholderapi) Installed.
* `%hrdatools_chat_muted%` - Shows if chat is muted or not.
* `%hrdatools_is_frozen%` - Shows if you are frozen or not.
* `%hrdatools_is_vanished%`- Shows if you are vanished or not.
* `%hrdatools_is_invincible%`- Shows if you have invinciblity on or off.
